INVOKE.COMMENT: Get the Time in the format of yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss forGLD WS

MAP.COMMENT: Set user error message for Transaction Save

Values.value: GLDExpressGateway: Error invoking the web service for processing AppSubmitRequest -- TransactionSave

MAP.COMMENT: === Call WS to submit a transaction ====
=== Call WS to submit transaction assets ====
=== Call WS to a transaction note ====
=== Call WS to update the related party ====
